judgment.summary: Fundamental assessment is limited by a lack of growth, margin, and balance sheet data.

news.paragraph: Financial stocks have shown intraday volatility, moving from lower premarket levels to higher afternoon trading. While macro concerns regarding high inflation and the unlikely prospect of rate cuts persist, the sector has experienced mixed movement throughout the session. Traders should monitor broader economic indicators and inflation trends as these factors continue to drive sector sentiment.
